name: Domlur
notes: Domlur flyover and Old Airport Road approaches see heavy peak-hour congestion, especially toward Indiranagar and MG Road.

name: Indiranagar 100 Feet Road
notes: Restaurant, retail, and office traffic make Indiranagar slow during evening peaks.

name: Silk Board Junction
notes: Known high-variance commute zone with frequent bottlenecks toward HSR, BTM, and Electronic City.

name: MG Road
notes: Central business district traffic, limited curbside stopping, and parking search time affect evening arrivals.
